options.name: --paths
options.description: Paths to SQLMesh project files

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to config file

options.name: --gateway
options.description: The name of the gateway

options.name: --ignore-warnings
options.description: Ignore warnings

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode

options.name: --log-to-stdout
options.description: Display logs in stdout

options.name: --log-file-dir
options.description: The directory to write log files to

name: -t
--template
options.description: Project template. Supported values: airflow, dbt, dlt, default, empty

options.name: --dlt-pipeline
options.description: DLT pipeline for which to generate a SQLMesh project. Use alongside template: dlt

subcommands.name: render
subcommands.description: Render a model's query, optionally expanding referenced models

options.name: --dialect
options.description: The SQL dialect to render the query as

options.name: --no-format
options.description: Disable fancy formatting of the query

options.name: --start
options.description: Start time for the render

options.name: --end
options.description: End time for the render

options.name: --execution-time
options.description: Execution time for the render

options.name: --expand
options.description: Expand referenced models

subcommands.name: evaluate
subcommands.description: Evaluate a model and return a dataframe with a default limit of 1000

options.name: --start
options.description: Start time for evaluation

options.name: --end
options.description: End time for evaluation

options.name: --execution-time
options.description: Execution time for evaluation

options.name: --limit
options.description: The number of rows which the query should be limited to

subcommands.name: format
subcommands.description: Format all SQL models and audits

name: -t
--transpile
options.description: Transpile project models to the specified dialect

options.name: --append-newline
options.description: Include a newline at the end of each file

options.name: --no-rewrite-casts
options.description: Preserve the existing casts, without rewriting them to use the :: syntax

options.name: --normalize
options.description: Whether or not to normalize identifiers to lowercase

options.name: --pad
options.description: Determines the pad size in a formatted string

options.name: --indent
options.description: Determines the indentation size in a formatted string

options.name: --normalize-functions
options.description: Whether or not to normalize all function names

options.name: --leading-comma
options.description: Determines whether or not the comma is leading or trailing in select expressions

options.name: --max-text-width
options.description: The max number of characters in a segment before creating new lines in pretty mode

options.name: --check
options.description: Whether or not to check formatting (but not actually format anything)

subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: Show the diff between the local state and the target environment

subcommands.name: plan
subcommands.description: Apply local changes to the target environment

options.name: --create-from
options.description: The environment to create the target environment from if it doesn't exist. Default: prod

options.name: --skip-tests
options.description: Skip tests prior to generating the plan if they are defined

options.name: --restate-model
options.description: Restate data for specified models and models downstream from the one specified

options.name: --no-gaps
options.description: Ensure that new snapshots have no data gaps when comparing to existing snapshots

options.name: --skip-backfill
options.description: Skip the backfill step and only create a virtual update for the plan

options.name: --empty-backfill
options.description: Produce empty backfill

options.name: --forward-only
options.description: Create a plan for forward-only changes

options.name: --allow-destructive-model
options.description: Allow destructive forward-only changes to models whose names match the expression

options.name: --effective-from
options.description: The effective date from which to apply forward-only changes on production

options.name: --no-prompts
options.description: Disable interactive prompts for the backfill time range

options.name: --auto-apply
options.description: Automatically apply the new plan after creation

options.name: --no-auto-categorization
options.description: Disable automatic change categorization

options.name: --include-unmodified
options.description: Include unmodified models in the target environment

options.name: --select-model
options.description: Select specific model changes that should be included in the plan

options.name: --backfill-model
options.description: Backfill only the models whose names match the expression

options.name: --no-diff
options.description: Hide text differences for changed models

options.name: --run
options.description: Run latest intervals as part of the plan application (prod environment only)

options.name: --enable-preview
options.description: Enable preview for forward-only models when targeting a development environment

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Evaluate missing intervals for the target environment

options.name: --start
options.description: Start time for the run

options.name: --end
options.description: End time for the run

options.name: --skip-janitor
options.description: Skip the janitor task

options.name: --ignore-cron
options.description: Run for all missing intervals, ignoring individual cron schedules

options.name: --select-model
options.description: Select specific models to run. Note: this always includes upstream dependencies

options.name: --exit-on-env-update
options.description: Exit with specified code if the run is interrupted by an update to the target environment

options.name: --no-auto-upstream
options.description: Do not automatically include upstream models. Only applicable when --select-model is used

subcommands.name: invalidate
subcommands.description: Invalidate the target environment, forcing its removal during the next run of the janitor process

name: -s
--sync
options.description: Wait for the environment to be deleted before returning

options.name: --ignore-ttl
options.description: Cleanup snapshots that are not referenced in any environment, regardless of when they're set to expire

subcommands.name: dag
subcommands.description: Render the DAG as an html file

options.name: --select-model
options.description: Select specific models to include in the dag

subcommands.name: create_test
subcommands.description: Generate a unit test fixture for a given model

name: -q
--query
options.description: Queries that will be used to generate data for the model's dependencies

name: -o
--overwrite
options.description: When true, the fixture file will be overwritten in case it already exists

name: -v
--var
options.description: Key-value pairs that will define variables needed by the model

name: -p
--path
options.description: The file path corresponding to the fixture, relative to the test directory

name: -n
--name
options.description: The name of the test that will be created

options.name: --include-ctes
options.description: When true, CTE fixtures will also be generated

name: -k
--match-pattern
options.description: Only run tests matching pattern

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: --preserve-fixtures
options.description: Preserve the fixture tables in the testing database, useful for debugging

subcommands.name: audit
subcommands.description: Run audits for the target model(s)

options.name: --model
options.description: A model to audit

options.name: --start
options.description: Start time for the audit

options.name: --end
options.description: End time for the audit

options.name: --execution-time
options.description: Execution time for the audit

options.name: --host
options.description: Bind socket to this host

options.name: --port
options.description: Bind socket to this port

options.name: --mode
options.description: Mode to start the UI in

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Migrate SQLMesh to the current running version

subcommands.name: rollback
subcommands.description: Rollback SQLMesh to the previous migration

subcommands.name: create_external_models
subcommands.description: Create a schema file containing external model schemas

options.name: --strict
options.description: Raise an error if the external model is missing in the database
